## Alternatives considered

## Which surface

- [ ] `bezant` (Rust facade)
- [ ] `bezant-api` (generated client / spec normalisation)
- [ ] `bezant-server` (HTTP sidecar)
- [ ] `bezant-cli`
- [ ] `bezant-mcp` (MCP tools)
- [ ] TypeScript client
- [ ] Docs / developer experience

## Upstream spec relationship

- [ ] This is already in the IBKR OpenAPI spec and we just don't expose it
- [ ] This is a pure bezant-side ergonomic helper (no spec change)
- [ ] This needs an upstream feature from IBKR we don't have yet
